steps.title: Introduce site and discovery
steps.content: The audience is unfamiliar with Angkor Wat, so the sentence should identify it while presenting Moreno's research. The relevant research is that he used a novel digital imaging technique to reveal hundreds of previously unknown images.

steps.title: Keep Moreno in focus
steps.content: A describes Moreno's method but does not explain what Angkor Wat is or what he found. B defines the technique without the site or discovery. D gives Angkor Wat's history but omits Moreno's research role. The answer is C.
